projectDescription: Responsive and customizable pricing component built with shadcn/ui and Next.js
keyFeatures: Responsive pricing cards with payment frequency toggles
Smooth animated price transitions with NumberFlow
Customizable tier highlights and popular badges
Built with shadcn/ui and Tailwind CSS
TypeScript support with full type definitions
publicApiSurface: Pricing component - Main pricing section with cards and frequency toggle
PricingCard - Individual pricing tier card with features and CTA
PricingHeader - Header section with title, subtitle, and frequency selector
Tab - Animated tab component for frequency selection
TIERS configuration - Array of pricing tier definitions
PricingTier interface - TypeScript interface for tier structure
